features.title: Advanced AI Features No One Else Offers
features.subtitle: Built with cutting-edge AI that learns your patterns and optimizes everything automatically.
features.aiDemandDesc: Predict demand using ML models trained on your industry data, weather, events & trends.
features.smartConflictDesc: AI auto-detects and resolves scheduling conflicts before they cost you money.
features.dynamicPricingDesc: Real-time price optimization based on demand, competition, seasonality & capacity.
features.doubleBookingDesc: Cross-platform sync ensures zero scheduling conflicts across all channels.
features.guestScoringDesc: AI-powered risk assessment and VIP detection for every booking.
features.revenueOptDesc: Gap-filling, turnover analysis, and profit-per-unit calculations in real time.
features.industriesSubtitle: One AI. Every industry. No limits.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: 3-day free trial. 1 industry per plan. Pay via Card or Payoneer.

footer.description: AI-powered scheduling & booking platform built for 8 industries. Smarter calendars, zero conflicts, maximum revenue.
footer.poweredBy: Powered by AI · Built for every industry

about.title: About HostFlow AI
about.subtitle: We're building the future of intelligent scheduling for every industry on the planet.
about.mission: To eliminate scheduling chaos and maximize revenue for businesses worldwide through AI-powered automation.
about.vision: A world where no business loses a single dollar to scheduling conflicts, missed bookings, or manual pricing guesswork — where one intelligent calendar powers every industry, every market, and every timezone seamlessly.
about.story: Founded in 2024, HostFlow AI was born from a simple frustration: why do businesses still lose money to double-bookings, pricing mistakes, and scheduling conflicts? We built an AI that solves all of these — across 8 industries, in one platform.
about.why1Desc: Every feature is powered by AI — from demand forecasting to dynamic pricing to conflict resolution.
about.why2Desc: One platform serves hospitality, airlines, healthcare, education, logistics, events, and more.
about.why3Desc: Our AI prevents double-bookings before they happen, saving you time and reputation.
about.why4Desc: Customers report an average 34% revenue increase within the first month of using our platform.
about.teamDesc: Our team combines decades of experience in AI, scheduling systems, and industry-specific solutions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailNotifsDesc: Receive booking confirmations and reminders via email
settings.pushNotifsDesc: Get instant alerts for new bookings and schedule changes
